archetype: 5 (Luxury) mixed with 2 (Performance Pro) for Automotive edge

layout_spacing.grid_mode: Mode A (Tetris) for Storefront, Mode B (Control Room) for Admin Dashboard

surfaces_and_borders.product_card: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#EF4444]/50 transition-all duration-300

components_instructions: Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for crisp, scalable UI adornments.
Marketing/Storefront: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for hero and bento grids, heavily prioritizing negative space and asymmetrical layouts.
Interactive UI: Form elements, modals, dropdowns must use customized Shadcn UI.
Admin Dashboard: High density, Mode B 'Control Room' grid, clear data visualizations. Use solid surfaces, never glass here.
Buttons: Use #EF4444 for primary actions. Hover state must explicitly shift color and text (e.g. hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white).
ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) and key informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='product-card-1').

hero.description: Close-up of a car's dashboard and steering wheel at night, showcasing the illuminated speedometer and controls.
time lapse photography of man riding car

products_stereos.description: Close-up of a car dashboard with a digital screen and controls.
Car dashboard showing an audio system display in a dimly lit interior, focusing on technology.

products_speakers.description: black and gray speaker on brown wooden table
Close-up of Bang & Olufsen speaker in car interior, featuring stylish design.

products_amps.description: Close-up of dual subwoofers in a car trunk with glowing lights.
Close-up of an intricate car audio and hydraulic setup with metal components.

products_lights.description: A sleek car's illuminated tail light with water droplets at night, showcasing modern automotive design.
White Ford Fiesta ST with neon lights in a night parking lot setting.

products_dashcams.description: Interior view of a car showing a mounted camera setup for filming or photography.

products_perfumes.description: A collection of ramos home and car fragrance products.
Small hanging diffuser bottle with wooden cap.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text contrasting follows WCAG AA (APCA preferred). Overlay hero text should use text-shadow or a gradient background (e.g. from-black/80 to-transparent) to stand out.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the product categories. Avoid standard bootstrap columns; embrace overlapping and wide gaps.
Nav header must be persistent. Use bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and z-50 to ensure readable nav links.
Integrate Razorpay payment gateway correctly with guest and account-based checkout flow. Implement order history and customer auth.
The admin dashboard (Orders, Products CRUD, Users) should use a strictly functional layout with pure solid backgrounds (#141414), standard dense grids, and no glassmorphism to preserve data clarity.
Cart state should be manageable and visible across the storefront, with easy access to checkout.
Apply `data-testid` attributes exhaustively to all buttons, nav links, form inputs, lists, and summary texts to prevent test flakiness.
Make product image aspect ratios consistent in grids (e.g., aspect-square or aspect-video) with object-cover.
